task_desc: Build Claude Code caretaker agent and policy. Define the caretaker policy as a Claude Code agent that reads fly state and decides actions. Policy rules: feed when hunger > 0.6 (place food near fly, not on top of it), dim lights when fatigue > 0.5, set temp neutral when fear > 0.3, vary stimuli when idle > 120s (light touch or food placement to spark curiosity), never stack stressors (no wind + touch + bright simultaneously), back off for 30s after any fear spike > 0.5. Agent runs on a ~5s decision loop: read state, evaluate policy, send 0-1 commands, log reasoning. Files: new `agent/caretaker-policy.md` (policy definition for Claude Code), new `agent/run.sh` (launch script that starts server + connects Claude Code).
